title: Cash/platform bounty scout — no safe PR candidate
channel: GitHub bounty issues / platform PR claims

evidence.summary: SecureBananaLabs/bug-bounty #76 Technical Poem Generation — NO-GO DUPLICATE: Large reward for trivial POEM.md creates extreme competition/quality-spam risk; active attempts/comments already present, approval odds poor despite clear cash rail.

Dokploy/dokploy #1413 Organisation and Teams Management — NO-GO DUPLICATE: Broad org/team management epic; useful slices are already claimed/submitted in comments, remaining scope is not a small verified diff.

QuantumSavory/QuantumSavory.jl #138 Interactive example — HOLD HIGH_USER_INPUT: Needs proposal/interactive example design and likely domain-specific Julia/quantum networking work; claim process asks name/context and proposal before implementation.

ubiquity/business-development #90 GitHub Based Marketing — NO-GO HIGH_RISK: External marketing/outreach/growth task risks spam/platform-policy friction and may require wallet/profile flow; not suitable for autonomous PR work.

midnightntwrk/contributor-hub #312 Compact contracts tutorial — NO-GO PAYMENT_UNCLEAR: Content/tutorial bounty has unclear current payout route and existing submissions; high workload and not cash-close for this scout.

UnsafeLabs/Bounty-Hunters #573 EMS PRF label — NO-GO DUPLICATE: Already attempted by this account and closed by automation; rework/retry would likely repeat low-approval loop without maintainer signal.

SecureBananaLabs/bug-bounty #29 Admin Panel — NO-GO OPPORTUNITY_COST: Scope is a full admin system, not a micro-bounty; high build/review burden and active competition make approval odds weak for this lane.

decision_history.summary: cash/platform bounty/direct-payout 후보 7건 검색 및 preflight 확인.
자동 PR 기준 통과 후보 없음: 경쟁/중복·범위 과대·지급 불명확.
외부 마케팅/지갑성 토큰/과밀한 AI bounty 및 기존 실패 재시도 위험 확인.
이번 후보들의 위험조정 기대 순수익은 0원. 구현/PR 미실행.

next_action: 다음 현금성 bounty scout에서 경쟁 낮고 payout rail 명확한 micro-bounty를 계속 검색. 기존 UnsafeLabs closed PR은 maintainer 신호 없으면 재시도하지 않음.
